rawAssistant: The relic storm that dwells within my Spire is not something to be taken lightly, nor to be grasped by those who would merely wield power without understanding its cost. I hold it because only through trials and tempests can true worth be proven. Challengers who seek mastery must first demonstrate their mettle. The storm will not be tamed by the faint of heart or the weak of will. Those who wish to claim this power must first prove themselves worthy.
